user.title: Connect to Intel AMT Device
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Intel AMT device. The default port is 16992 (HTTP) or 16993 (HTTPS/TLS). Username is typically 'admin'.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host, port, and that AMT is enabled.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This AMT device is already configured.
